member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.Snapshot.Performance.Interface.Section.CallTree.CallTreeSectionNodeHelpers.IsInsideYourTree(JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.CallTreeSectionNode,JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.CallTreeSectionNode)
member.summary: Check whether some snapshot node is located inside the subtree of the current node.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.Snapshot.Performance.Interface.Section.CallTree.CallTreeSectionNodeHelpers.IsInsideYourTree(JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.CallTreeSectionNode,JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.CallTreeSectionOffset)
member.summary: Check whether some snapshot node offset is located inside the subtree of the current node.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.Snapshot.Performance.Interface.Section.CallTree.CallTreeSectionNodeHelpers.IsInsideYourTreeInclusive(JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.CallTreeSectionNode,JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.CallTreeSectionOffset)
member.summary: Check whether some snapshot node offset is located inside the subtree of the current node including this same node.

member.name: M:JetBrains.dotTrace.Snapshot.Performance.Interface.Section.CallTree.IFastSectionAsStreamReader.ReadNodesReverseFastI(JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.CallTreeSectionNode[],JetBrains.DotTrace.DalInterface.Performance.CallTree.CallTreeSectionOffset,System.Int32)
member.summary: Same as ReadNodesReverseFast, with the difference that right offset node is included into the result list. Thus we retrieve [0;Offset] set instead of [0;Offset)
